# ANALYSIS: SNIPER_LEVEL_BREAK_BASE_PARAMS_WF_VALIDATION

**Filed:** 2026-06-15  
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)  
**Type:** analysis  
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

We are validating the base SNIPER_LEVEL_BREAK strategy with parameters: premium_stop_pct=-0.06, tp1_premium_pct=0.4, runner_target_pct=3.0, profit_lock_threshold_pct=0.0, strike_offset=2. We hypothesize that this parameter set will show a WF ratio >= 0.50 (not overfit) and OOS edge_capture >= 771 (the OP-16 acceptance threshold).

## Mechanism

Entry: SNIPER_LEVEL_BREAK trigger (price breaks a named level with volume and confirmation conditions, as defined in the SNIPER watcher logic).  
Exit logic:  
- Premium stop: -6% of entry premium (stop loss)  
- TP1: 40% of entry premium (sell 2/3 of position)  
- Runner: remaining 1/3 runs until hitting a premium target of 3.0x entry premium (fixed target, as profit_lock_threshold_pct=0.0 disables profit-lock chandelier)  
Note: Mechanism details are inferred from parameter names and standard SNIPER logic; exact trigger conditions require Stage-1 code review.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=28 requires $25K+ account; $1K paper account scales to ~14% of headline P&L (per OP-20 disclosure note in system prompt).  
2. **Sample bias:** 16-month data split 80/20 IS/OOS; parameter set selected from Stage-2 sweep introduces selection bias and overfit risk.  
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (WF ratio, OOS WR, OOS edge_capture unknown without backtest)  
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (validation on top 3 J days pending)  
5. **Failure modes:**  
   - Worst day: unknown -- requires Stage-1 backtest  
   - Max drawdown: unknown -- requires Stage-1 backtest  
   - Blow-up scenario: Tight -6% stop may cause frequent losses in volatile markets; 3.0x runner target may be unachievable in choppy regimes, stranding runner.  
6. **Concentration:** unknown -- requires Stage-1 backtest (top-5 days contribution to P&L unknown)  

## Pre-merge gate

Gym validators must pass; walk-forward validation must show WF ratio >= 0.50 (to avoid overfit flag) and OOS edge_capture >= 771; real-fills validation on top 3 J days must show P&L within ±20% of BS simulation.

## Confidence

0 / 10 -- No backtest results available to assess validity; all impact projections require Stage-1 execution.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

This analysis evaluates the base SNIPER_LEVEL_BREAK parameter set. The leaderboard currently contains SNIPER candidates with VIX filters (e.g., #13 SNIPER_VIX18_GRINDER, #14 SNIPER_VIX_TREND_OOS_CONFIRMED, #15 SNIPER_VIX_TREND_STAGE2_ENTRY_SWEEP). If validated, this base parameter set would complement existing SNIPER_VIX_TREND candidates by providing a non-filtered baseline. It does not conflict with current leaderboard entries as no base SNIPER_LEVEL_BREAK candidate is listed (all SNIPER candidates in leaderboard incorporate VIX regime filters). Validation could enable a new candidate for the SNIPER_LEVEL_BREAK trade class without VIX filters.
